summary: Student Management Platform for Cognify coaching institute including student registration/profiles, course enrollment system, attendance tracking, test results/progress reports, and admin dashboard
architectural_notes: Building a student management platform for Cognify coaching institute
Target users: students (Class 6-10), educators, and admin staff
Core functionality: registration, enrollment, attendance, progress tracking
Study material upload system for admins to share resources with students

existing_features.title: Create student registration system allowing new students to sign up with name, class (6-10), contact number, email, and parent contact information
Implement student profile management where students can view and update their personal information, enrolled courses, and contact details

Build course enrollment system supporting courses for Class 6-8 (Foundation Building: Mathematics, Science, Basic Concept Development, Activity-Based Learning) and Class 9-10 (Board Preparation: Complete NCERT Coverage, Mathematics, Science including Physics/Chemistry/Biology)
Create attendance tracking system where admins can mark daily attendance for each student by course, and students can view their attendance history and percentage
Implement test results and progress tracking where admins can record test scores for weekly tests, and students can view their test history, scores, and performance trends
Build admin dashboard with role-based authentication providing overview of total students, course enrollments, attendance statistics, and test performance summaries

Implement admin student management interface allowing admins to view all students, search/filter by name or class, view detailed student profiles including enrollment and performance data, and edit student information
Create admin course management interface allowing admins to add new courses, edit course details (name, description, class level), and view enrollment counts per course

Design a modern, education-focused visual theme with a professional academic aesthetic using warm, welcoming colors (avoiding blue and purple), clean typography suitable for an educational institution, and consistent spacing and layout patterns that convey trust and clarity
Create an admin setup page accessible via URL parameter (e.g., ?setup=admin) that allows the first-time setup of admin accounts by entering Internet Identity principals
Add an admin settings page where existing admins can view the list of all admin principals and add or remove admin privileges for other users
Create a help document or info section on the login page that explains how to access the platform as an owner, including instructions for Internet Identity setup and obtaining principal IDs

Create an admin study materials management page at /admin/materials that displays all uploaded materials in a table with columns for title, description, course, class level, upload date, and actions (edit, delete)

Add an upload study material dialog on the admin materials page with a form that includes fields for title, description, course selection, class level selection, and file upload input accepting PDF, DOC, DOCX, PPT, PPTX file types

Create React Query hooks for study material operations including useStudyMaterials for fetching all materials with filters, useUploadStudyMaterial for admin uploads, useUpdateStudyMaterial for editing, useDeleteStudyMaterial for deletion, and useDownloadStudyMaterial for student downloads
Add a student-facing study materials page at /materials that displays available study materials filtered by the student's enrolled courses and class level, with download buttons for each material
Update the Layout component navigation to include a 'Study Materials' link in the student menu pointing to /materials and an 'Upload Materials' link in the admin menu pointing to /admin/materials
Add the phone number 7780951766 as a contact phone number displayed in the footer of the Layout component alongside existing branding and social links

new_feature_requests.summary: Check/modify admin authentication setup to enable owner access
Add a backend function that allows the system to designate specific Internet Identity principals as administrators, with the ability to add/remove admin privileges programmatically
Update the useActor hook to automatically grant admin privileges to the first authenticated user if no admins exist in the system
Add study material upload functionality for admins
Add phone number 7780951766 to platform configuration

Create a backend data type for study materials that includes fields for material ID, title, description, file name, file content (as Blob), course ID association, class level, upload timestamp, and uploader principal

Implement backend functions for admins to upload study materials (create), retrieve all study materials with filtering by course and class level (read), update material metadata (update), and delete materials (delete)
Add backend function for students to download study materials by material ID, returning the file content and metadata
